description: This photograph depicts a wide seascape with a large, rugged, and hazy mountainous landmass in the background. The sky above the mountains is pale blue to white, suggesting atmospheric haze or mist. The water in the foreground and midground is a dark teal-blue, showing white caps and choppiness, indicative of wind. Three white-sailed sailboats are visible on the water, two in the midground and one further right in the distance. A large cargo ship or tanker is visible in the mid-distance to the left, partially obscured by the atmospheric conditions.
